creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 196803
patch file

Since v0.4.17, go-ipfs started to provide full source tarball [1] which includes all dependencies required for build. Switch port to use it instead of LOCAL/yuri/ipfs-go-gx-*.tar.xz

QA:
  poudriere testport: OK (120a, 112a, 104i)

[1] https://github.com/ipfs/go-ipfs/releases/download/v0.4.17/go-ipfs-source.tar.gz
